name: Ittetsu
description: Ittetsu is a genin from Sunagakure. He admired the Kazekage from the bottom of his heart and was part of the group of Suna shinobi who went to rescue the Kazekage from the Akatsuki. When he heard the Kazekage was revived, he was so relieved he had to cry, which Matsuri slugged him for.
